name: Emarsys (SAP)
description: Customer-engagement marketing automation with REST API (now SAP-owned).

seo.title: Emarsys (SAP) — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Emarsys (SAP): Customer-engagement marketing automation with REST API (now SAP-owned).

when_to_use: Personalized lifecycle email campaigns triggered by events
Omnichannel marketing automation across email and mobile
Customer segmentation driving retention campaigns via API
E-commerce re-engagement flows connected to SAP Commerce
Predictive send-time optimization for email newsletters

pros: Mature cross-channel engagement with AI recommendations
Tight integration with SAP CX suite post-acquisition
Strong retail and e-commerce industry playbooks
Robust REST API for enterprise integrations
cons: Enterprise pricing and long sales cycles
review.verdict: Enterprise-grade retention platform; strongest pick if youre already in the SAP ecosystem.
review.best_for: Mid-market to enterprise retail running on SAP stack
review.not_for: Startups needing fast setup and self-serve pricing
